questions: which number to call in emergency
emergency te ki number e call korbo
answers: The national emergency number in Bangladesh is 999. You can use it for police, fire, and ambulance services all from one number.
Bangladesh e emergency number holo 999. Police er jonno 100, fire service er jonno 199 o dial korte paren.
Dial 999 for any emergency in Bangladesh. It connects you to police, fire, and ambulance. For specific services: Police 100, Fire 199, Women helpline 10921.
Emergency te 999 dial korun — eta police, fire, ambulance shob cover kore. Globally, USA te 911, UK te 999, Europe e 112 use hoy.
